mapper.select: SELECT * FROM observability_events WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM observability_events WHERE event_type = #{eventType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO observability_events (event_id, user_id, user_name, event_type, question, question_length, model_id, channel_id, session_id, workspace_id, result, response_duration_ms, error_type, error_message, error_stack, error_fingerprint, error_status_code, breadcrumbs, tags, client_version, client_platform, client_os_version, created_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{eventType}, #{question}, #{questionLength}, #{modelId}, #{channelId}, #{sessionId}, #{workspaceId}, #{result}, #{responseDurationMs}, #{errorType}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorStack}, #{errorFingerprint}, #{errorStatusCode}, #{breadcrumbs}, #{tags}, #{clientVersion}, #{clientPlatform}, #{clientOsVersion}, #{createdAt})
